entities.name: Forward-looking statements regarding 2026 priorities and ESG goals

attributes.topics: leverage reduction, portfolio sustainability, selective investment

entities.context: Looking to 2026, our priorities are clear: sustaining performance across the portfolio, continuing to reduce leverage, and investing selectively where we have a meaningful competitive advantage.

entities.name: Risk that ESG strategy may not be executed within expected time frames
entities.context: Factors that could cause results to differ materially from those described in the forward-looking statements include our inability to execute upon our ESG strategy within expected time frames or at all.

The Audit Committee has appointed PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP ("PwC") to serve as our independent auditors with respect to our operations for the year ending December 31, 2026 ... PwC's qualifications and performance in that capacity for Organon since its retention in 2019.
Sincerely, Carrie S. Cox, Executive Chair (signed shareholder letter accompanying the proxy).
Mr. Weaver serves as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary.
